item.title: The Economist is hiring an Audience Editor in London
item.description: "Exciting job opportunity. The Economist is looking for a talented Audience Editor to join their team in London. Check out the details and apply now: https://www.economist.com/britain/2026/04/01/the-economist-is-hiring-an-audience-editor-in-london #TheEconomist #JobOpening #CareerOpportunity"
